fields.description: Current stage in your sales process

fields.description: Deal probability rating - Cold and Low are excluded from weighted pipeline calculations

fields.description: When you expect to close this deal

fields.description: How this opportunity came to us

fields.name: Project
fields.description: Project created from this opportunity (if won)

tables.name: Projects

fields.description: Type(s) of work on this project
